{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = silver mist
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The will of the Book brought [[silver mist]] to [[life]] as an army of warriors.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
